sizing_rule.note: Position size must not exceed the peak of the optimal f curve. Sizing beyond optimal f constitutes overleveraging; sizing below optimal f is suboptimal. Optimal f derived empirically from cumulative probability analysis with equal probability (1/N) assigned to each of N historical trades/scenarios.

source_rule_text: Do not position size beyond the optimal f curve peak; traders with too many contracts relative to optimal f are overleveraged, analogous to having too few contracts when below optimal f.
